title: Transformer-Based Weed Segmentation for Grass Management
reason_note: Transformer-based semantic segmentation (Swin, SegFormer, Segmenter) for weed/grass detection with a dataset of 1006 images across 10 weed classes

title: Semantic segmentation of microbial alterations based on SegFormer
reason_note: SegFormer-based semantic segmentation of strawberry diseases (7 disease types); collected and augmented dataset of 2450 images

title: Domain adaptation of deep neural networks for tree part segmentation using synthetic forest trees
reason_note: Unsupervised domain adaptation for tree part segmentation from synthetic forest LiDAR data to real forest environments using PointNet++

title: Instance segmentation for the fine detection of crop and weed plants by precision agricultural robots
reason_note: Mask R-CNN instance segmentation for crop/weed detection in agricultural robot imagery; 2489 annotated specimens of 2 crop + 4 weed species

title: FruitSeg30_Segmentation dataset & mask annotations: A novel dataset for diverse fruit segmentation and classification
reason_note: FruitSeg30 dataset: 1969 images with mask annotations across 30 fruit classes for segmentation and classification (Data in Brief)

title: Towards Domain Generalization in Crop and Weed Segmentation for Precision Farming Robots
reason_note: Domain generalized semantic segmentation for crop/weed detection; leverages unlabeled images and style transfer for domain generalization

title: A robust fusion–pruning framework for lightweight CNNs: Application to apple leaf disease diagnosis under real-world image corruptions
reason_note: Fusion–pruning framework (MobileNetV2+NASNetMobile) for apple leaf disease diagnosis robust to real-world image corruptions; cross-domain validation on PlantDoc

title: GenYOLO-leaf: a data-centric and open source framework for generalizable leaf instance segmentation across diverse datasets
reason_note: GenYOLO-Leaf: data-centric leaf instance segmentation framework with 145K leaf instances across multiple datasets; zero-shot evaluation on 8 datasets

title: ROSE-X: an annotated data set for evaluation of 3D plant organ segmentation methods
reason_note: ROSE-X: 11 annotated 3D models of rosebush plants from X-ray CT; organ-level semantic labels for leaf/stem segmentation benchmarking

title: Advanced drone-based weed detection using feature-enriched deep learning approach
reason_note: Custom drone-based weed detection model (GhostConv, ECA attention) for soybeans; introduces purpose-built weed dataset from drone imagery

title: MuST-C Dataset: The Multi-Sensor and Multi-Temporal Data Set of Multiple Crops for In-Field Phenotyping and Monitoring
reason_note: MuST-C: Multi-Sensor Multi-Temporal dataset of 6 crop species with RGB, LiDAR, multispectral from aerial and ground robots for phenotyping (P001 seed)

title: TomatoScanner: phenotyping tomato fruit based on only RGB image
reason_note: TomatoScanner: RGB-only tomato fruit phenotyping via EdgeYOLO instance segmentation + Depth Pro depth estimation; introduces Tomato Phenotype Dataset

title: Plant classification system for crop /weed discrimination without segmentation
reason_note: Early work (2014): Random Forest-based crop/weed classification without segmentation on carrot farm images from field robot

title: Weed Mapping in Early-Season Maize Fields Using Object-Based Analysis of Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) Images
reason_note: OBIA-based weed mapping from UAV multispectral imagery in early-season maize fields; 2013 foundational work

title: Dataset of annotated food crops and weed images for robotic computer vision control
reason_note: Dataset of 1118 annotated food crop and weed images (6 crop, 8 weed species) for robotic weed control; Data in Brief

title: Agricultural robot dataset for plant classification, localization and mapping on sugar beet fields
reason_note: Agricultural robot dataset for sugar beet fields: multispectral, RGB-D, LiDAR over 3 months; plant classification, localization, and mapping

title: Edge-Efficient Two-Stream Multimodal Architecture for Non-Intrusive Bathroom Fall Detection
reason_note: Bathroom fall detection using mmWave radar and vibration; no agricultural or plant science application

title: YOLOv11-Seg-SSC: Soybean Seedling Segmentation and Spatial Localization from Low-Altitude UAV Imagery
reason_note: YOLOv11-seg-SSC for soybean seedling instance segmentation and georeferenced spatial localization from low-altitude UAV imagery

title: A survey of datasets for computer vision in agriculture
reason_note: Survey of 45 agricultural CV datasets; online catalog at smartfarminglab.github.io/field_dataset_survey/

title: SegFormerDiffusion: A Transformer–Diffusion Hybrid for High-Resolution Potato-Leaf Lesion Segmentation
reason_note: SegFormer + diffusion decoder for high-resolution potato leaf lesion segmentation; achieves 99.34% Dice score
